evals.expected_behavior: Should read both files, add standard function header comments (Name/Input/Output/Description format), add inline comments for key logic, use // style not /* */, add section separators with // ====================. Report summary table at end.

Should first run git diff --cached --name-only to identify changed files, then only comment the changed parts (new functions get headers, new fields get inline comments). Should NOT touch unchanged old code.

Should add // comments to every macro, enum value, struct field, and function declaration. Should NOT add file header comment to .h file. Should NOT add /* GUARD */ to #endif. Struct fields should have aligned inline comments.

evals.prompt: 给 can.c 添加注释，参照 docs/协议表.md
evals.expected_behavior: Should first read docs/协议表.md for protocol details, then add comments referencing protocol field meanings, register addresses, bit definitions. Comments should cite the protocol document path.
